en: Well, I doubt it since she's been dead for 14 years. Technically, she was never alive.
Rachel was Jennifer Wilson's stillborn daughter 14 years ago.
No, that's... that's not right. Why would she do that? Why?
Why would she think of her daughter in her last moments? Yup, sociopath. I'm seeing it now.
She didn't think about her daughter. She scratched her name on the floor with her fingernails.
She was dying. It took effort. It would have hurt.
ko: 그녀는 죽어가고 있었어. 힘이 들었을 거야. 아팠을 거야.

en: You said that the victims all took the poison themselves, that he makes them take it.
ko: 너는 피해자들이 모두 스스로 독을 마셨다고 했지,

en: Well, maybe he, I don't know, talks to them? Maybe he used the death of her daughter somehow.
ko: 글쎄, 아마 그가, 잘 모르겠지만, 그들과 대화했을까?

en: But that was ages ago. Why would she still be upset?
ko: 하지만 그건 오래 전 일이야. 왜 아직도 괴로워할까?

en: Not good? A bit not good, yeah.
ko: 좋지 않아? 조금 좋지 않아, 그래.

en: Yeah, but if you were dying, if you'd been murdered in your very last few seconds, what would you say?
Please, God, let me live. Use your imagination. I don't have to.
Yeah, but if you were clever, really clever, Jennifer Wilson running all those lovers, she was clever.
ko: 응, 하지만 만약 네가 똑똑하다면, 정말 똑똑하다면...
